protein_name: Putative Notch ligand involved in the mediation of Notch signaling. Involved in limb development. Expressed in heart, placenta and skeletal muscle and to a lesser extent in pancreas. Very low expression in brain, lung, liver and kidney. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: calcium ion binding; growth factor activity; Notch binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: auditory receptor cell fate commitment; cell communication; cell differentiation; gamma-delta T cell differentiation; Notch signaling pathway; positive regulation of Notch signaling pathway; regulation of cell population proliferation; spermatogenesis; T cell differentiation; thymic T cell selection
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: hJ2; JAG2; jagged 2; jagged canonical Notch ligand 2; Jagged2; Protein jagged-2; SER2
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.53 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
